3039310.name: Goner In The Town
3039310.description: Goner In The Town” is a 3DFPSRPG game in which players use four types of guns and skills called modules to defeat enemies that appear on the map and advance the story. 4 types of guns (handgun, assault rifle, shotgun, and sniper rifle) have no number of bullets outside the magazine. does not exist, and reloading is done by consuming the MP bar that is consumed when using a skill. In addition, when a weapon is held in reserve, the number of remaining ammunition is gradually increased. This system requires the player to fight while switching the gun to be used according to the situation. Make full use of your skills and four types of guns to defeat your enemies and close in on the disappearance of the city...
